info.title: Ucode API
info.description: Core Ucode API reference for authentication, tables, items, files, and server functions.

tags.description: Table, collection, and field schema endpoints.

tags.description: Create, read, update, delete, aggregate, and reorder table records.

fields.description: Unordered map of dynamically typed values.

kind.description:
The kind of value.

Types that are assignable to Kind:

	*Value_NullValue
	*Value_NumberValue
	*Value_StringValue
	*Value_BoolValue
	*Value_StructValue
	*Value_ListValue
